message:
chore: update lockfile for tracing-serde and beads status

Add tracing-serde 0.2.0 and enable serde/serde_json/tracing-serde
features on tracing-subscriber.

Update beads: close bd-2u0.5.2.3 (recovery/stress fixture suite
completed), move bd-gy4.2 (layout decision evidence ledger) to
in_progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -154,7 +154,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.2","title":"Build exhaustive demo corpus and scenario metadata","description":"## Why this exists
An amazing demo is only as strong as its scenarios. This track builds a complete corpus that demonstrates every feature family, including malformed and stress inputs.

## Scope
- Capability-to-example mapping for full feature coverage.
- Curated happy-path gallery examples.
- Recovery and stress fixtures to prove resilience.

## Deliverables
- Versioned scenario catalog.
- Metadata tags for feature coverage and narrative fit.
- Reusable fixtures for QA and performance tracks.

## Acceptance Evidence
Coverage report showing each key capability mapped to at least one live demo scenario.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:23.582093305Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:56:39.720495420Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["content","coverage","demo"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:23.582093305Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:26.238885025Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":112,"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Dependency rationale: this track exists as an execution lane with explicit upstream blockers and concrete downstream evidence obligations so contributors can act without consulting external planning docs.","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:30Z"},{"id":122,"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Optimization rationale: removed track-level hard block on bd-2u0.5.10 to avoid unnecessary serialization. Reference mining remains enforced at subtask level (e.g., gallery/corpus quality) so scope and quality are preserved while throughput improves.","created_at":"2026-02-13T05:56:39Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.2.1","title":"Create capability-to-scenario coverage matrix (all feature families)","description":"## Objective
Build a source-of-truth matrix mapping each promised capability to one or more executable demo examples.

## Subtasks
- Enumerate feature categories (parser, layout, rendering, export, diagnostics, performance, accessibility).
- Map each category to concrete scenario IDs.
- Mark confidence and maturity (implemented/partial/experimental).

## Evidence
Machine-readable capability-to-scenario matrix committed and consumed by demo UI.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:23.676499370Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-19T23:21:01.715179422Z","closed_at":"2026-03-19T23:21:01.714691388Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["content","demo","matrix"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:27.204352106Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:23.676499370Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.2.2","title":"Author canonical happy-path gallery scenarios with narrative annotations","description":"## Objective
Author polished "golden" scenarios that show FrankenMermaid at its best across diagram families.

## Subtasks
- Create flagship example per major diagram family.
- Add narrative annotations: what to look for and why it matters.
- Ensure examples render deterministically with expected output artifacts.

## Evidence
Golden example set with metadata and deterministic hash baselines.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:23.774003675Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:22.017731350Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["content","demo","gallery"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.10.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:22.017681727Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:23.774003675Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:27.300744980Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-2u0.5.2.3","title":"Build recovery and stress fixture suite (malformed + high-load cases)","description":"## Objective
Demonstrate robustness, not just ideal behavior.

## Subtasks
- Add malformed-input recovery examples.
- Add adversarial/edge cases that stress parser/layout/render budgets.
- Tag each fixture with expected diagnostics and fallback behavior.

## Evidence
Recovery and stress fixture suite with expected diagnostics snapshots.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:23.872140964Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-20T03:30:14.808099509Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["content","demo","resilience"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:23.872140964Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:27.393615691Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.3","title":"Implement high-impact showcase shell UX and navigation architecture","description":"## Why this exists
The shell experience determines first impression and usability. This track builds the visual and interaction foundation that makes complex features explorable.

## Scope
- Information architecture and panel model.
- Responsive shell implementation.
- URL-addressable state for reproducible demos.

## Deliverables
- Cohesive app shell and navigation model.
- Stable panel orchestration and state persistence.
- Deep-link support for scenarios and settings.

## Acceptance Evidence
Users can open a link and land in the exact scenario/configuration state shown by the author.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:23.967690049Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:56:39.845405938Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","frontend","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:23.967690049Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:26.332505831Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":113,"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Dependency rationale: this track exists as an execution lane with explicit upstream blockers and concrete downstream evidence obligations so contributors can act without consulting external planning docs.","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:30Z"},{"id":123,"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Optimization rationale: removed track-level hard block on bd-2u0.5.10 and pushed dependency to IA/implementation subtasks. This allows shell scaffolding to start earlier while still requiring reference-informed convergence before critical design decisions lock in.","created_at":"2026-02-13T05:56:39Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.3.1","title":"Define information architecture, sections, and panel interaction contracts","description":"## Objective
Create the IA blueprint before implementation.

## Subtasks
- Define top-level sections (Explore, Compare, Performance, Accessibility, Tour).
- Define panel responsibilities and interaction contracts.
- Specify mobile/tablet/desktop layout rules.

## Evidence
IA spec artifact with explicit route and panel contracts.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.065881890Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:22.139494636Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","ia","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:27.488581985Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.10.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:22.139453198Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.065881890Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.3.2","title":"Implement responsive split-pane app shell with adaptive panel behavior","description":"## Objective
Implement a polished, responsive shell that can host all showcase modules.

## Subtasks
- Build split-pane layout with resizable/collapsible panels.
- Implement adaptive layout behavior for narrow viewports.
- Add visual hierarchy and spacing tuned for dense technical content.

## Evidence
Responsive shell verified across target breakpoints with no critical usability regressions.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.164016835Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:22.257081352Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","responsive","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.10.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:22.257022763Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.164016835Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:27.581577039Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-gy4.10","title":"Performance regression CI gate with slo.yaml enforcement","description":"Define slo.yaml for FrankenMermaid: layout latency p50/p95/p99 for standard graph sizes, parse throughput, render throughput. CI gate fails build on regression. Uses franken_bench.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:12.578368335Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T18:05:49.767614202Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","frankenmermaid","performance"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-gy4.10","depends_on_id":"bd-gy4.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:48Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-gy4.11","title":"Galaxy-brain transparency: layout decision explanation UI","description":"Progressive disclosure UI showing WHY each layout decision was made. Level 0: traffic light. Level 1: plain English. Level 2: constraint satisfaction details. Level 3: full Bayesian posterior. Implements the suite galaxy-brain pattern.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:12.830206306Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T18:05:49.904310978Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankenmermaid","observability","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-gy4.11","depends_on_id":"bd-gy4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:48Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-gy4.12","title":"Logging spec enforcement: lint rule for mandatory trace_id/decision_id fields","description":"Create a CI lint rule that verifies all log/trace/evidence emit calls include mandatory fields: trace_id, decision_id. Fail build if any log statement in FrankenMermaid crates is missing required fields. Cardinality budget enforcement.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:21.696959586Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-20T03:36:59.131729064Z","closed_at":"2026-03-20T03:36:59.131211875Z","close_reason":"Added 3 tracing field enforcement tests that capture tracing output as JSON and validate mandatory field presence: dispatch (requested, selected, reason, diagram_type, node_count, edge_count), cycle_removal (strategy), guardrail (algorithm, reason). Added tracing-subscriber and serde_json dev-dependencies.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","frankenmermaid","logging","observability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-gy4.12","depends_on_id":"bd-gy4.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:48Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Loss function over layout quality vs compute time.
